*Remove all italics before submittion*
Fixes #__ *remove if no issue fixed*
**what did I change**
*Two sentence minimum: What did you change in this PR*

**why did I change it**
*Two sentences minimum, why did you change stuff for this PR*

**UI changes**
*Before and After if no changes were made to the UI put N/A*

**checklist**
*It is ok if not all boxes are checked, but I will deny it if no boxes are checked*
- [ ] I explained what and why with 2 sentences minimum for both sections
- [ ] I showed UI changes before and after photos
- [ ] Changes are small
- [ ] Bug Free (if fixes an issue gives the issue fixed)
- [ ] Only one change made
